Notice And Motion For An Order Permitting Discovery Of The Financial Condition Of Defts F & B Associates, Inc. And Dirk Alton; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
James Pagano, Esq., and Ian A. Kass, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Colby Reade
Michael D. Drenan, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: F & B Associates

After hearing, Plaintiff Colby Reade's Motion for order permitting discovery of the financial condition of defendants F&B Associates, Inc. and Dirk Alton is Denied. Defendant ordered to identify pertinent financial documents and person most qualified as provided in Civil Code Section 3295. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
